content:
# IBM Carbon Design System - Overview

Page type: data_table
Use cases: enterprise dashboard, admin panel, data management, audit logs
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://carbondesignsystem.com/

Visual traits:
- neutral palette
- high information density
- clear hierarchy
- systematic spacing

Use when:
- enterprise dashboard
- admin panel
- data management
- audit logs

Avoid when:
- luxury landing page
- emotion-driven consumer campaign
- highly editorial brand page

AI summary: Use Carbon-style patterns for dense enterprise data tables: neutral palette, strong alignment, toolbar/filter locality, accessible row states, and explicit empty/loading/error handling.

# IBM Carbon Design System - Layout Rules

Page type: data_table
Use cases: enterprise dashboard, admin panel, data management, audit logs
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://carbondesignsystem.com/

- Place table actions and filters close to the table they affect.
- Keep primary actions visually distinct from secondary batch actions.
- Use persistent column labels and predictable row alignment for scannability.

AI summary: Use Carbon-style patterns for dense enterprise data tables: neutral palette, strong alignment, toolbar/filter locality, accessible row states, and explicit empty/loading/error handling.

# IBM Carbon Design System - Component Patterns

Page type: data_table
Use cases: enterprise dashboard, admin panel, data management, audit logs
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://carbondesignsystem.com/

- toolbar
- filter controls
- sortable columns
- row selection
- pagination
- empty state
- loading state

AI summary: Use Carbon-style patterns for dense enterprise data tables: neutral palette, strong alignment, toolbar/filter locality, accessible row states, and explicit empty/loading/error handling.

# IBM Carbon Design System - Interaction States

Page type: data_table
Use cases: enterprise dashboard, admin panel, data management, audit logs
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://carbondesignsystem.com/

- hover row
- selected row
- loading
- empty
- error
- disabled action

AI summary: Use Carbon-style patterns for dense enterprise data tables: neutral palette, strong alignment, toolbar/filter locality, accessible row states, and explicit empty/loading/error handling.

# IBM Carbon Design System - Accessibility Notes

Page type: data_table
Use cases: enterprise dashboard, admin panel, data management, audit logs
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://carbondesignsystem.com/

- Keyboard navigation and visible focus states are required for dense data surfaces.
- Status, sorting, and selection should not rely on color alone.

AI summary: Use Carbon-style patterns for dense enterprise data tables: neutral palette, strong alignment, toolbar/filter locality, accessible row states, and explicit empty/loading/error handling.

# IBM Carbon Design System - Implementation Hints

Page type: data_table
Use cases: enterprise dashboard, admin panel, data management, audit logs
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://carbondesignsystem.com/

- Use when the user asks for serious B2B, admin, analytics, or enterprise UI.
- Favor restraint over decorative gradients on data-heavy pages.
- Expose empty/error/loading states in code, not only the happy path.

AI summary: Use Carbon-style patterns for dense enterprise data tables: neutral palette, strong alignment, toolbar/filter locality, accessible row states, and explicit empty/loading/error handling.
